description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 temporal reasoning overhaul.

Implement a small temporal metadata model in OM state (for example `recordedAt`, referenced start/end, precision, relation, original phrase) plus durable rendering that preserves the original phrase while attaching a normalized anchor in the stored observation output.
title: Add TemporalAnchor metadata and durable rendering for OM observations
